seo.title: Loan Calculator: Monthly Payment, Interest & Amortization | Numerly
seo.description: Calculate monthly payment, total interest, and total cost using loan amount, annual rate, and term.

intro: Use this loan calculator to estimate monthly payments for fixed-rate loans.
explanation: Enter principal, annual rate, and years. The calculator applies standard amortization to return monthly payment, total payment, and total interest.

faqs.a: It estimates monthly payment and total interest for an installment loan.
No. It includes principal and interest only.
Yes. Payment becomes principal divided by months.
Lenders may include fees, insurance, or different rounding.

faqs.q: Can I use this for auto loans?
faqs.a: Yes, for fixed-rate installment auto loans.

formulaExplanation: Enter principal, annual rate, and years. The calculator applies standard amortization to return monthly payment, total payment, and total interest.
edgeCases: Very long terms can significantly increase interest cost.
Zero or near-zero rates reduce compounding impact.
Always verify units (monthly vs annual) before interpreting output.
practicalTips: Compare at least two scenarios before making decisions.
Use conservative assumptions for rates and growth.
Review total cost, not just monthly amount.
